title: ceropegia subscandens
intro: Ceropegia subscandens, also known as the chain of hearts or string of hearts, is a flowering succulent plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Native to Madagascar, it is prized for its unique, heart-shaped leaves that grow in a chain-like fashion. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as wounds, fever, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Ceropegia subscandens can be made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, and it is also used in teas and tinctures to harness its health benefits.
